page.title: Overnight Yacht Rental Marbella: Sleep Aboard Guide

data.meta_description: Book an overnight yacht rental Marbella and sleep aboard in Puerto Banús. Prices from €2,299 for 8 hours. Speak to our team today.
data.summary: Discover overnight yacht rental Marbella with our fleet moored at Puerto Banús. Sleep aboard yachts like the Astondoa 40 or Mangusta 80, with skipper, drinks, and snacks included.
key_facts: Overnight charters start from €2,299 for 8 hours on Tier A yachts (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39).
All overnight rentals include a licensed skipper, fuel, insurance, and Spanish VAT.
Free jet ski included on Mangusta 80 models (minimum 4-hour charter).
Fleet moored at Puerto Banús, Marbella – easy boarding for sunset and sleepover.
Sleep aboard yachts up to 29m, with capacity for 5–12 guests.
Included drinks: water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, and light snacks.
Overnight options available for groups, couples, or private celebrations.

faq.q: Can I sleep overnight on a yacht in Marbella?
faq.a: Yes, you can sleep aboard many of our yachts moored in Puerto Banús. Overnight charters typically run from late afternoon to the next morning, with the yacht remaining docked or anchored near Marbella's coast. All bookings include a skipper who stays onboard, and you'll have access to cabins, bathrooms, and the saloon.

faq.q: Which yachts are available for overnight rental in Marbella?
faq.a: Our overnight fleet includes the Astondoa 40 (up to 9 guests), Azimut 39 (11 guests), Mangusta 80 (12 guests), and larger models like the Ferretti 94 (12 guests). Each yacht has sleeping cabins, a galley, and onboard amenities. Smaller boats like the Bandido (8 guests) are also suitable for shorter overnight trips.

faq.q: What is included in an overnight yacht rental Marbella?
faq.a: Every overnight charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish VAT (21%). For Mangusta 80 bookings, a jet ski is included free for the duration. Food catering can be arranged on request.

faq.q: How much does an overnight yacht rental cost in Marbella?
faq.a: Tier A yachts (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) cost €749 for 2 hours or €2,299 for 8 hours. Mangusta 80 models start at €4,719 for a minimum 4-hour charter. For other yachts, pricing is available on request via WhatsApp. Overnight stays typically require a full-day or extended charter.

faq.q: Where do overnight yacht charters depart from?
faq.a: All our yachts depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella's premier marina. You'll board at our designated dock, and the skipper will take you along the Costa del Sol. Overnight stays can be anchored near Cala del Faro, Cala Cortés, or within the marina itself, depending on your preference.

faq.q: Can I bring my own food and drinks on an overnight yacht?
faq.a: Yes, you are welcome to bring your own food and drinks. Our standard package includes soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, and light snacks. If you'd like a catered meal, let us know in advance and we can arrange it at an additional cost. The yacht's galley is available for storage.

faq.q: Is a skipper required for overnight yacht rental?
faq.a: Yes, a licensed skipper is included with every charter. They will handle navigation, docking, and safety. You do not need a boating license. The skipper stays onboard overnight and ensures the yacht is secure. You are free to relax and enjoy the experience.

faq.q: How many people can sleep on a yacht in Marbella?
faq.a: Capacity varies by yacht: the Astondoa 40 sleeps up to 9 guests, Azimut 39 sleeps 11, Mangusta 80 sleeps 12, and the Ferretti 94 also sleeps 12. Smaller boats like the Bandido sleep 8. Cabins are air-conditioned and include en-suite bathrooms where available.

data.body_html:
Sleeping aboard a yacht in Marbella is the ultimate way to experience the Costa del Sol after dark. With overnight yacht rental Marbella, you can anchor in a quiet cove or stay dockside at Puerto Banús, wake up to sea views, and enjoy a morning swim before heading back. Our fleet includes everything from the 12.5m Astondoa 40 to the 29m Ferretti 94, all moored in Marbella's most glamorous marina.

Why Choose an Overnight Yacht Rental in Marbella?

An overnight charter lets you escape the crowds and enjoy the Mediterranean at your own pace. Instead of rushing back to port, you can watch the sunset from the flybridge, dine under the stars, and sleep in a cabin with the gentle sound of waves. It's ideal for couples celebrating an anniversary, groups of friends on holiday, or families looking for a unique experience. Puerto Banús is lively at night, but from the deck of your yacht you get front-row seats to the glittering marina lights without the noise.

Our Overnight Fleet: Which Yacht Fits Your Group?

We offer a range of yachts suitable for overnight stays, each with comfortable cabins and onboard facilities. Here's a quick overview:

  • Astondoa 40 (12.5m, 9 pax) – €749/2h → €2,299/8h. Perfect for small groups or couples. Two cabins, saloon, and a spacious sundeck.
  • Azimut 39 (12.5m, 11 pax) – Same pricing as Astondoa. Slightly more cabin space, ideal for families.
  • Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) – From €4,719 for 4 hours, includes a free jet ski. Three cabins, flybridge, and a large saloon.
  • Ferretti 94 (29m, 12 pax) – Pricing on request. Luxurious with four cabins, a master suite, and a jacuzzi on the flybridge.
  • Bandido (11.5m, 8 pax) – A sportier option for smaller groups, with one cabin and a cockpit perfect for al fresco dining.

For a full list, visit our boat rental Marbella page.

What's Included in Your Overnight Charter?

Every overnight charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish VAT (21%). For Mangusta 80 bookings, a jet ski is included free for the duration. You can also arrange catering, extra drinks, or a private chef – just let us know when booking. The skipper stays onboard overnight, ensuring your safety and handling any questions.

Where Will You Sleep? Popular Anchorage Spots

Your skipper can recommend several spots depending on the weather and your preferences. Popular overnight locations include:

  • Cala del Faro – A quiet cove near the Marbella lighthouse, calm waters and stunning sunrise views.
  • Cala Cortés – Sheltered bay with clear water, ideal for a morning swim.
  • Puerto Banús dock – Stay in the marina if you want to step ashore for dinner or nightlife. The yacht remains safe and secure.
  • Cabopino – A short cruise east, with a sandy beach and relaxed vibe.

Your skipper will anchor or dock as you wish, and you can adjust the plan during the charter.

How to Book an Overnight Yacht in Marbella

Booking is straightforward. Contact us via WhatsApp or phone – we'll confirm availability for your preferred date and yacht. A deposit secures the charter, and the balance is due on the day. We recommend booking at least a week in advance for overnight stays, especially in summer (June–September). You can also check our Marbella yacht charter page for the full fleet and pricing.

Frequently Asked Questions

Can I sleep overnight on a yacht in Marbella?

Yes, you can sleep aboard many of our yachts moored in Puerto Banús. Overnight charters typically run from late afternoon to the next morning, with the yacht remaining docked or anchored near Marbella's coast. All bookings include a skipper who stays onboard, and you'll have access to cabins, bathrooms, and the saloon.

Which yachts are available for overnight rental in Marbella?

Our overnight fleet includes the Astondoa 40 (up to 9 guests), Azimut 39 (11 guests), Mangusta 80 (12 guests), and larger models like the Ferretti 94 (12 guests). Each yacht has sleeping cabins, a galley, and onboard amenities. Smaller boats like the Bandido (8 guests) are also suitable for shorter overnight trips.

What is included in an overnight yacht rental Marbella?

Every overnight charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish VAT (21%). For Mangusta 80 bookings, a jet ski is included free for the duration. Food catering can be arranged on request.

How much does an overnight yacht rental cost in Marbella?

Tier A yachts (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) cost €749 for 2 hours or €2,299 for 8 hours. Mangusta 80 models start at €4,719 for a minimum 4-hour charter. For other yachts, pricing is available on request via WhatsApp. Overnight stays typically require a full-day or extended charter.

Where do overnight yacht charters depart from?

All our yachts depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella's premier marina. You'll board at our designated dock, and the skipper will take you along the Costa del Sol. Overnight stays can be anchored near Cala del Faro, Cala Cortés, or within the marina itself, depending on your preference.

Can I bring my own food and drinks on an overnight yacht?

Yes, you are welcome to bring your own food and drinks. Our standard package includes soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, and light snacks. If you'd like a catered meal, let us know in advance and we can arrange it at an additional cost. The yacht's galley is available for storage.

Is a skipper required for overnight yacht rental?

Yes, a licensed skipper is included with every charter. They will handle navigation, docking, and safety. You do not need a boating license. The skipper stays onboard overnight and ensures the yacht is secure. You are free to relax and enjoy the experience.

How many people can sleep on a yacht in Marbella?

Capacity varies by yacht: the Astondoa 40 sleeps up to 9 guests, Azimut 39 sleeps 11, Mangusta 80 sleeps 12, and the Ferretti 94 also sleeps 12. Smaller boats like the Bandido sleep 8. Cabins are air-conditioned and include en-suite bathrooms where available.
